speaker: speaker2
text: I'm going to the hospital to see Susan .

speaker: speaker1
text: I saw her yesterday.She was a little better .

speaker: speaker2
text: Must I catch a number 7 bus to get there ?

speaker: speaker1
text: No , you needn't . A number 13 bus will also take you to the hospital .

speaker: speaker2
text: Number 13 buses run much more frequently , don't they ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes . I caught a number 7 bus yesterday , and they said I had taken a wrong bus .

speaker: speaker2
text: Thank you , Henry . I'll get a number 13 .

speaker: speaker1
text: But number 13 buses leave from the center of town.You ' ll have to walk two miles to catch one .
